headline: CSX Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) announced that the Company’s Board of Directors approved a $0.14 per share quarterly dividend on the Company’s common stock. The dividend is payable Sept. 15, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business Aug. 31, 2026. headline: Intel Stock Back In Growth Mode, But Sellers Still Smack Shares Ahead Of Q2 Report
summary: Intel has transformed itself and is back in growth mode ahead of earnings. But Intel stock hasn't been immune to the chip market sell-off.

headline: Billionaire Investor Cuts Rail Bets, Slashing Norfolk Southern And Union Pacific Stakes
summary: Dan Loeb’s Third Point slashed Norfolk Southern and Union Pacific stakes by more than 90% while exiting CSX amid railroad merger uncertainty.
